programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Joe Flacco passed for 342 yards and three touchdowns as he rallied Cincinnati to a 33-31 victory over the Pittsburgh Steelers as the third time during the regular season where both starting quarterbacks are in their 40s.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tony Pollard rushes for a career-high 161 yards and two touchdowns as Tennessee averages 5.3 yards per carry; the defense forces a pair of turnovers in the second half and the special teams block a punt.

programme.title: NFL Media Originals
programme.desc: Best moments from the top 15 games of the 2025 NFL season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Baker Mayfield and the Buccaneers battle with Sam Darnold and the Seahawks in a back-and-forth shootout that features an elite wide receiver matchup between Emeka Egbuka and Jaxon Smith-Njigba in a game that comes down to the wire.

programme.title: NFL Game of the Week
programme.desc: New York Jets running back Breece Hall rushed for 2 second-half touchdowns and threw a 4-yard touchdown pass to Mason Taylor with 1:54 left, helping Justin Fields and the Jets edge the Cincinnati Bengals 39-38 on Sunday for their first win.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: In a stirring battle between 2 rookie quarterbacks, Pick No. 40 came out on top of Pick No. 1 as the New Orleans Saints rallied to beat the Tennessee Titans 34-26 on Sunday at Nissan Stadium in Nashville.

programme.title: Glam Golf with Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal competes in a 2v2 match with Sabrina, Alexis and Marissa from Golf Girl Games.

programme.title: Glam Golf with Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal teams up with Sabrina Andolpho, founder of the popular influencer group Golf Girl Games, for fun competitions with athletes and celebrities.

programme.title: Glam Golf with Blair O'Neal
programme.sub-title: Birdie Challenge with Aaron Hicks & Hailey Ostrom
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal invites MLB star Aaron Hicks and golf influencer Hailey Ostrom for a high-stakes round of golf.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Celine goes in depth on how she determines targets and shot shapes both off the tee and into the green.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Celine goes in depth on her Par 5 strategy to optimize her chances for scoring.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Bones takes on the role of caddie for YouTube sensation Rick Shiels, giving viewers an inside look at the strategies used by major champions. Rick gets in depth advice for a variety of shots and he gives insight on how to build confidence.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Bones takes on the role of caddie in Part 2 of this 2-part series with YouTube sensation Rick Shiels where they go in-depth on how shot shape and club selection are critical on a windy day; Rick picks Bones' brain on a variety of shots.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Jim "Bones" Mackay travels to Las Vegas to meet up with LPGA Tour winner Jenny Shin on the course for Part 1 of a 2-part series. Jenny shares her tips andstrategies that have led to her LPGA career of over a decade.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: LPGA Tour winner Jenny Shin joins Bones on the course to share her tips and strategies that have led to her success at the highest level; Jenny explains how she’d play an approach shot differently.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Randall Hunt takes new client Roger Bassin through a 90-day program of unique exercises, high-tech analysis and swing instruction to alleviate neck issues.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Lower back pain is an issue that plagues many golfers, and Randall Hunt is on a mission to eliminate that physical limitation.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Randall Hunt takes David Shimp through a 90-day program of unique exercises, high-tech analysis and swing instruction to alleviate back issues.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Brianna Asman learn how to increase range of motion, add distance and play pain-free golf through a 90-day program of swing instruction.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Matt Avril learn how to increase mobility and turn his slice into a powerful draw.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you add distance and hit more fairways with the driver by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to thetop, bring it down through impact and into the finish learning the biggest keys and drills.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you hit more greens and make more powerful contact with the irons by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to stop slices and hooks with the driver, improve tempo and rhythm with your irons and more.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to eliminate the chicken wing for more accuracy with the driver, fix fact contact with your irons.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Right to Left Left to Right
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty teaches techniques and tips for achieving excellent golf performance when playing into the wind. He shows how to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust club selection to make the most of the weather conditions.

programme.title: The Conor Moore Show
programme.desc: The most popular comedy skits and sketches from three seasons of The Conor Moore Show; from marriage counseling to the best (or worst) swing coach in the world, Conor and friends are guaranteed to provide a laugh.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.desc: Dallas Stars center Tyler Seguin shares different shots that he uses on the ice, specifically the slapshot.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.sub-title: Golf Vs Snowboarding: Shaun White Part 1
programme.desc: Olympic gold medalist Shaun White shares how the basics of snowboarding can translate to the golf swing.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.sub-title: Golf Vs Snowboarding: Shaun White Part 2
programme.desc: Olympic gold medalist Shaun White shares how snowboarding moves like backflips and complex tricks can translate to the golf swing.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.desc: Dallas Stars center Tyler Seguin shares different shots that he uses on the ice, specifically the slapshot.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Host Martin Hall talks to Ryder Cup stalwart Padraig Harrington about his approach to his golf swing.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Padraig Harrington talks how to hit the driver better, farther, and with more accuracy.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Padraig Harrington talks how to chip, pitch, and improve your bunker shots. Harrington shares secrets on the short game and how using a variety of clubs will help lower your scores.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Padraig Harrington talks all things putting and shares tips on how to putt better to lower score.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Host Martin Hall talks to Ryder Cup stalwart Padraig Harrington about his approach to his golf swing.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy, Keegan Bradley and Fenway Sports Group form a roster and beginto carve an identity for Boston Common Golf, one of the six teams that make upthe tech-infused golf league known as TGL. The team of four introduces themselves to Boston.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Boston Common Golf scrambles to adjust after the SoFi center roof collapse postpones the league a full year and a team member forfeits their spot on the Ballfrogs in favor of a LIV Golf offer.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: An inside look at Keegan Bradley's childhood in Woodstock, Vt.; his career and connection to the city of Boston; with Tyrrell Hatton leaving, they go on the recruiting trail to find a fourth member; David Ortiz talks to the team.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Boston Common Golf closes the deal with their final team member in Japanese superstar Hideki Matsuyama; Rory McIlroy gets his first look at the TGL performance lab.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Rory and Keegan get a first look at the SoFi Center in a pre-season match to get familiar with the new game format, while TGL tests out every element of the competition ahead of the league's debut.
